testcase.name: test_install_standard_pack_returns_controlled_response_not_503

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iteration_141_install_pack_resilience.py:28: in setup_method assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_install_standard_pack_response_structure_with_single_country

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iteration_141_install_pack_resilience.py:28: in setup_method assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_failed_countries_structure_if_present

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iteration_141_install_pack_resilience.py:28: in setup_method assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
